reviews.review_description:
As many have said it’s like VR lemmings in concept but the strategy and gameplay feel very unique. 
I like to support developers who make games a little different than the usual shooter, music fitness or horror game as they can come up with gems like this.
Give it a go - if you don’t like it you can refund it but I think you’ll enjoy it too much to do that.

MRHBK

developer_response.body: Thank you for being one of the first supporters! It is much appreciated, every time somebody buys the game helps us continue with further development and make this so much more than it already is. Have fun!

reviews.review_title: A nice PvP lemmings 3D style game
reviews.review_description: Gameplay can become a little hectic when playing against 3 other players and it requires quite a lot of space to move around. The simplicity of the graphics coupled with the tactics and easy to master controls, mean that you can play it for quite some time without having to worry about battery drain or dizziness. Definitely a good game to play some matches with friends

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! You can actually play it without walking and just move around with your controllers. Some people even play it seated :) Happy to hear that you are enjoying the game!

reviews.review_title: Classic Lemmings with a modern twist
reviews.review_description: I am old enough to have enjoyed the original classic Lemmings game when it came out and I absolutely loved it. There have been many attempts to resurrect and recapture the magic of the original game since then but nothing really quite got there for me. Having tried this game it felt like a natural evolution with a great twist - multiplayer. I've only managed to play the tutorial and 1 round of offline game with AI (which is not great, but good for getting to grips with things without much pressure) because there wasn't anyone else online. But what I've seen was quite impressive, polished and entertaining. I can see this being an absolutely delightful chaos with 4 real players and I can't wait to give it a go.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! The game has been released just a few days ago, but new players are coming every day! Join our discord at niftons.com and you can arrange some matches with other players :-) The offline game is just for practice right now, but we plan to add a single player mode soon, stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: This game is super fun, very unique from a majority of VR, but that doesn’t drag it down at all! The gameplay is enjoyable, and with multiplayer no 2 games will be alike with different strategies and focuses. A must have indeed!
Easy-to-understand mechanics, as well as creating of logical right paths, make this game a wonderful title to start playing VR. Gotta try multiplayer mode, I'm really excited!

reviews.review_title: Best game I've played here by far
reviews.review_description:
Please get this game and play it, this game is seriously one of the most original ges I've played in my whole life. I need someone to play with in this game.

I like to describe this game as a competitive puzzle game, it's nice and slow so pure skill doesn't beat actual planning. And there are so many different strategies that you won't play the same game twice or have set strategies.

I don’t have much playtime but after a few matches I can tell this can be one of my favorite games to come! A little buggy but still really fun with a PVP x Sandbox genre. I got given a key from the dev but it is totally worth it to buy.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! I'm surprised you found some bugs, we put great effort into making the game bug-free, could you please report what bugs you found on our discord? (join through nittons.com)

reviews.review_description:
Old gamers will remember the Lemmings games. Same concept, in a battle arena. Build a path from point A to point B, while attempting to sabotage your competitors, while trying to undo their attempts to sabotage your path. Use magic to get the upper hand (I love watching the ghost spell working from close up!)

Possibilities are endless. I had 3 lines taking the 3 magic towers and 3 other lines scoring in one round. Zip lines and paths and directional signs abounding! It really is up to your imagination how you want to play. I can see this one being a hit.

developer_response.body: This is a pretty good description of the gameplay, thanks for that!

reviews.review_description: I honestly loved this game. It's hard to find a fun and nice multiplayer puzzle game, and this game does it perfectly. Congrats to the devs! :D

I loved the concept of creating path for those little dudes. Got some strategic part into it. 

This game is perfect for long play hours.

This game reminds me of the old Lemmings game visually but takes that to the next level by introducing PvP. There are so many different strategy tactics to score points and prevent your opponent from getting to their exit. The tutorial walks you through (almost) everything you need to know. From there, gather your friends and let your mind churn on all of the different possible strategies you can use to thwart your friends from scoring points!  It’s a strategists dream!

developer_response.body: Great to hear the game found its way to a true strategist! There's not many strategy games on Quest, that's why we decided to build this, for people like you and me to have a blast competing with our friends. Thanks for the review!

reviews.review_description: Really good strategy game. Fun to play. The tutorial is very helpful. I’ve been looking for this type of game for ages so I’m glad I got this. Initially I thought 30 minutes per game would be too long but before I knew it the time was up and thoroughly enjoyed it. Would definitely recommend getting this game.

developer_response.body: Thanks for this review! I've heard that from other people as well, but usually after they try it out, they come to the same conclusion - 30 minutes is the perfect time! Anyway, based on the requests, we implemented 20 minutes matches for players who just want a fast skirmish!

reviews.review_title: Potential to be one of the greats!
reviews.review_description: Just by me playing the tutorial alone, this game is the definition of a concept executed greatly. It also kinda ties in with real about traffic control. Also the instructions during the tutorial were very helpful. Definitely would recommend and that more people find this game. W Strategy game in my book.

developer_response.body: Thrilled to hear that you appreciate how the gameplay is polished, because we put a lot of work specifically into that. No bugs and intuitive and easy gameplay is always our goal!

reviews.review_description: I played about 1 hour of this game and it is so much fun, can't wait till my friends get it so we can have a battle getting our niftons home. Love the concept, very much along the humanity lines. It is a very colourful game with easy to follow instructions and I would like to congratulate the dev for a great game. Keep up the great work and thanks.

developer_response.body: Thank you for amazing review, I'm so happy to hear you are enjoying the game! You're gonna have a blast playing with friends :)

reviews.review_description:
This game gives me the nostalgic Lemmings feeling. I like the control of the game (although it needs some practice).
The game is focused on online multiplayer gaming, but the tutorial already gave me much joy. Maybe a future release can also have a standalone playing option with a different kind of levels/objectives?

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! We are definitely thinking about adding single player mode sooner or later.
